posts.author: annafeller97 (Anna Feller)
posts.cookedHtml:
I aimed to upgrade all my integrations between zapier and monday.com recently. One question i could not find in the forum or documentation: is this still the link to post to or has this one changed as well? https://api.monday.com/v2
Second, do I actually need to update each zap to the new monday version or is there any workaround? I would highly appreciate some advise on that, since we are using over 100 integrations and that would be a lot of monkey work to do.
